document.title: IEC 60601-1 Test Report for ADD Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

sourceSummary.oneLine: Nemko Korea CB Scheme IEC 60601-1 safety test report REP032757 for H&abyz ADD digital flat panel X-ray detector models HAD1717MCW and HAD1417MCW.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports regulatory evidence for basic safety, essential performance, IEC 60601-1 compliance, national differences, usability collateral testing, and component safety review.
keyPoints: Report REP032757 was issued on 2024-05-02 by Nemko Korea Co., Ltd. under CB Scheme procedure.
The test item is a Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector with model/type reference ADD.
The main model is HAD1717MCW and variant HAD1417MCW is identical except for model name, dimensions, weight, pixel number, and pixel area.
National differences for United States, Canada, Japan, and Korea are included or applied.
Biocompatibility and EMC are documented by manufacturer declaration and are not fully evaluated as part of this test report.

entities.name: H&abyz Co., Ltd.
entities.evidence: Applicant’s name : H&abyz Co., Ltd.; Manufacturer : Same as applicant

entities.name: Nemko Korea Co., Ltd.
entities.evidence: Name of Testing Laboratory preparing the Report : Nemko Korea Co., Ltd.; CB Testing Laboratory: Nemko Korea Co., Ltd.

entities.name: IECEE
entities.evidence: Copyright © 2023 IEC System of Conformity Assessment Schemes for Electrotechnical Equipment and Components (IECEE System).

entities.name: HAD1417MCW
entities.evidence: The variants HAD1417MCW are identical to main model HAD1717MCW except for model name, dimension, weight, total pixel number, total pixel area, effective pixel number and effective pixel area.

entities.name: DEPS9601A
entities.evidence: The power supply box, model DEPS9601 and DEPS9601A have been separately tested and certified by Nemko.

entities.name: BM090S15F
entities.evidence: The AC/DC adapter, model BM090S15F has been separately tested and certified by UL.

entities.name: SDB-3S1PA
entities.evidence: The rechargeable Li-ion battery, model SDB-3S1PA has been separately tested and certified by TÜV Rh.

concepts.name: IEC 60601-1 compliance
concepts.evidence: The product fulfils the requirements of IEC 60601-1:2005 + AMD1:2012 + AMD2:2020 and EN 60601-1:2006 + A1:2013 + A2:2021.

concepts.name: CB Scheme test report validity
concepts.evidence: This report is not valid as a CB Test Report unless signed by an approved IECEE Testing Laboratory and appended to a CB Test Certificate issued by an NCB in accordance with IECEE 02.

concepts.name: Type B applied part
concepts.evidence: Degree of protection against electric shock (Patient connections): Type B applied part for front panel of detector

concepts.name: Class I and internally powered classification
concepts.evidence: Class I for power supply box and AC/DC adapter; Internally powered for detector

concepts.name: Usability engineering
concepts.evidence: The usability engineering process has been evaluated according to IEC 60601-1-6:2010 + AMD1:2013 + AMD2:2020.

concepts.name: Software safety class B
concepts.evidence: Software development process for Software Classification applied in accordance with Clause 4.3 and 4.4 of IEC 62304:2006 and IEC 62304:2006/AMD1:2015: Software Class: B

concepts.name: National differences
concepts.evidence: National Differences for the following countries have been applied in this test report: United States (US), Canada (CA) and Japan (JP)

evidence.evidenceText: Report Number : REP032757; Date of issue : 2024-05-02

evidence.claim: The test item is a Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
evidence.evidenceText: Test item description : Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector
evidence.pageTarget: ADD Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

evidence.claim: The report uses CB Scheme test procedure.
The tested standard set includes IEC 60601-1:2005 with AMD1:2012 and AMD2:2020.

evidence.evidenceText: The product fulfils the requirements of IEC 60601-1:2005 + AMD1:2012 + AMD2:2020 and EN 60601-1:2006 + A1:2013 + A2:2021.

evidence.claim: The main model is HAD1717MCW and HAD1417MCW is a variant.
evidence.evidenceText: The main model is HAD1717MCW. The variants HAD1417MCW are identical to main model HAD1717MCW except for model name, dimension, weight, total pixel number, total pixel area, effective pixel number and effective pixel area

evidence.claim: The equipment is intended for general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy for adults and children and is not intended for mammography.
evidence.evidenceText: The equipment is indicated for digital imaging solution designed for providing general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy targeting both adult and children. It is intended to replace film based radiographic diagnostic systems. But the equipment is not intended to be used for mammography.

evidence.claim: The detector front panel is classified as a Type B applied part.
evidence.evidenceText: TYPE B APPLIED PART Front panel of detector is classified as type B applied part.

evidence.claim: The equipment is ordinary equipment with IPX0 ingress protection.
evidence.evidenceText: Degree of protection against harmful ingress of water or particulate matter: Ordinary equipment (IPX0)

evidence.claim: The equipment mode of operation is continuous operation.
Risk management results are documented on the basis of ISO 14971:2019 and EN ISO 14971:2019/A11:2021 and reviewed by Nemko.
evidence.evidenceText: RM Results are documented by the manufacturer on the basis of ISO 14971:2019 and EN ISO 14971:2019/A11:2021 referring to the OD-2044-1 (ed.1.0) from IECEE, and are reviewed by Nemko.

evidence.claim: The usability engineering process was evaluated to IEC 60601-1-6 with AMD1 and AMD2.
evidence.evidenceText: The usability engineering process has been evaluated according to IEC 60601-1-6:2010 + AMD1:2013 + AMD2:2020.

evidence.claim: The software is classified as Class B to IEC 62304.
evidence.evidenceText: the software is classified as Class B to IEC 62304

evidence.claim: The manufacturer declared IEC 60601-1-2 EMC compliance, but EMC was documented by manufacturer declaration.
evidence.evidenceText: The manufacturer has declared that the equipment is in compliance with the requirements of IEC 60601-1-2, Electromagnetic disturbances. Compliance is documented by the manufacturer.

evidence.claim: Biocompatibility was declared by the manufacturer and not evaluated as part of this test report.
evidence.evidenceText: The manufacturer has declared that the equipment is in compliance with the requirements of ISO 10993-1. Biocompatibility is not evaluated as part of this test report.

evidence.claim: National differences for United States, Canada, and Japan were applied; Korea national differences were attached for information only.
evidence.evidenceText: National Differences for the following countries have been applied in this test report: United States (US), Canada (CA) and Japan (JP); Korea national differences ... was applied and attached in this test report for information only

evidence.claim: This test report does not cover requirements for ME systems.
evidence.evidenceText: This test report does not cover the requirements for ME systems, refer to general product information and other remarks.

reviewFlags.reason: Document revision/version is not explicitly stated in the report body; filename includes Rev.01 but no formal report revision field was found.
CB Test Report validity depends on signature by an approved IECEE Testing Laboratory and attachment to a CB Test Certificate issued by an NCB.
Biocompatibility and EMC compliance are reported as manufacturer-declared or documented, with biocompatibility not evaluated as part of this test report and EMC marked N/E.
Korea national differences are stated as attached for information only because Korea national differences aligned with IEC 60601-1:2005 + AMD1:2012 + AMD2:2020 had not been declared.
